Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class StatementResponse

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.StatementResponse
public class StatementResponse extends Object
Represents the Statement Response (STMTRS) aggregate in an OFX banking message. This typically includes the default currency for the statement, account information, a list of transactions, and the ledger balance. This class is designed for JAXB marshalling and unmarshalling of OFX XML elements.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    BankAccountInfo
    bankAcctFrom
    Information about the bank account from which the statement is generated.

    The list of bank transactions included in this statement.
    String

    The default currency for the amounts in this statement.

  • Field Details

    • curDef

      public String curDef
      The default currency for the amounts in this statement. Corresponds to the OFX tag <CURDEF>. (e.g., "USD")

    • bankAcctFrom

      public BankAccountInfo bankAcctFrom
      Information about the bank account from which the statement is generated. Corresponds to the OFX aggregate <BANKACCTFROM>.

    • bankTranList

      public BankTransactionList bankTranList
      The list of bank transactions included in this statement. Corresponds to the OFX aggregate <BANKTRANLIST>.

    • ledgerBal

      public Balance ledgerBal
      The ledger balance of the account. Corresponds to the OFX aggregate <LEDGERBAL>.

  • Constructor Details

    • StatementResponse

      public StatementResponse()
